narrative:
Precinct Madison Village Aa (precinct in Lake County) has 1,114 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
